input.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

raw.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

winner: At Cheney's funeral, the casket was opened for a rare moment of bipartisan unity... and Dick Cheney yelled, "Wrong coffin!

candidates.text: At Cheney's funeral, a surprise eulogy was delivered...by a hamster named Dick.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific twist with a clever pun on 'Dick'."}

candidates.text: At Cheney's funeral, the casket was opened for a rare moment of bipartisan unity... and Dick Cheney yelled, "Wrong coffin!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific reference to Dick Cheney, concise and funny"}

candidates.text: Why don't you find Dick Cheney's funerals hard to navigate? Because even in death, he still has a way of bringing all the former vice presidents together!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and plays on the headline, but it's a bit forced and lacks originality. The pun on 'navigate' feels weak, and the humor doesn't fully land due to its predictability."}

candidates.text: At Cheney's funeral, even Biden and Trump agreed - it was the first time in years they were both on their best behavior!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on political behavior, concise and specific with a touch of irony."}

candidates.text: At Cheney's funeral, even Dick had a hard time keeping up with all the former vice presidents.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and has a mild pun on 'keeping up,' but it lacks surprise and feels slightly forced. The reference to 'Dick' (assuming Dick Cheney) is clear, but the humor is underdeveloped."}
